title: ida shigerui
intro: Ida shigerui, also known as Japanese angelica or Tochu, is a perennial plant native to Japan, belonging to the Apiaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Ida shigerui include its ability to stimulate the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Ida shigerui can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
